name: Change Request Procedure
text: Any request for a change to the services or scope of work under this Agreement shall be submitted in writing by the requesting Party. No such change shall be effective unless mutually agreed upon and documented in writing by both Parties.

legal_basis.note: Novation and alteration of contract terms

invalid_if: Changes can be made unilaterally by one party without the consent of the other.
Changes to the agreement are permitted to be made orally or through implied conduct.
title: Change Request
dispute_hotspots: Verbal scope creep — client says 'you agreed to do X', vendor denies
Unapproved work delivered — client refuses to pay for work not in Change Order
